name: Fettuccine with Garlic Shrimp and Basil Mint Pesto
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds uncooked large shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely grind basil, mint leaves, Parmesan cheese, and 3 tablespoons of garlic in a food processor.
2. Gradually add 1 cup of olive oil to the food processor and process until the pesto is well blended. Transfer to a bowl. Season with salt and pepper. (The pesto can be made up to 3 days ahead. Cover the surface with plastic wrap and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.)
3. Cook fettuccine in a large pot of boiling salted water until tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally.
4. Meanwhile, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add shrimp and 1 tablespoon garlic; sauté until the shrimp are cooked through, about 4 minutes. Remove from heat.
5. Drain pasta. Return to the same pot. Add pesto and toss to coat. Transfer to a large bowl. Arrange shrimp over pasta and serve.
